entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., a crop grown in dry environments of north west India

entities.name: NORTH WEST INDIA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is commonly grown

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: State in India where dry environments and rainfall variations were observed

entities.name: DRY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by erratic rainfall and water stress

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Unpredictable rainfall patterns resulting in variable yields

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress categorized as control, mild, moderate, and severe

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, including grain mass and grain number

entities.name: GRAIN MASS
entities.description: A component of grain yield

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER
entities.description: A component of grain yield

entities.name: TILLER NUMBER
entities.description: A trait associated with LG 2 under mild water stress

entities.name: PHI
entities.description: A trait associated with LG 2 under severe water stress

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: A trait associated with LG 4 and LG 6 under mild and moderate water stress

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: A trait associated with LG 4 and LG 6 under mild and moderate water stress

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci and their interactions

entities.name: LG 2
entities.description: Linkage group associated with grain yield components, tiller number, and PHI

entities.name: LG 4
entities.description: Linkage group associated with stover yield and flowering time

entities.name: LG 6
entities.description: Linkage group associated with stover yield and flowering time

entities.name: H 77/833-2 ALLELES
entities.description: Alleles from the H 77/833-2 parent that influence yield

entities.name: PRLT 2/89-33 ALLELES
entities.description: Alleles from the PRLT 2/89-33 parent that influence yield

entities.name: RIL CROSS
entities.description: Recombinant Inbred Line cross used to generate F7 progenies

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT-SPECIFIC IDEOTYPES
entities.description: Target plant types designed for specific environmental conditions
